title: Tag
description: Object representing a tag in the Factory I/O scene.

address.description: Tag address used by the controller.

type.description: Data type of the tag's value.

kind.description: Kind of tag from the controller point of view.

value.description: Current tag value. Boolean for Bit type, number for Int/Float types.

openCircuit.description: Whether the tag has an always-off (open circuit) failure active.

shortCircuit.description: Whether the tag has an always-on (short circuit) failure active.

isForced.description: Whether the tag value is currently forced.

forcedValue.description: Tag value used when the tag is forced.
